title: justicia arrabidae
intro: Justicia arrabidae, also known as the Indian trumpet vine or justicia, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and long, trumpet-shaped calyx. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Justicia arrabidae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Justicia arrabidae are commonly used in traditional medicine, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
